inputs.label: Candy Stage
inputs.businessContext: Select candy cooking stage: 1=Thread (230°F), 2=Soft Ball (238°F), 3=Firm Ball (245°F), 4=Hard Ball (255°F), 5=Soft Crack (280°F), 6=Hard Crack (305°F), 7=Caramel (335°F), 0=Custom

businessContext_i18n.en: Select candy cooking stage: 1=Thread (230°F), 2=Soft Ball (238°F), 3=Firm Ball (245°F), 4=Hard Ball (255°F), 5=Soft Crack (280°F), 6=Hard Crack (305°F), 7=Caramel (335°F), 0=Custom
businessContext_i18n.tr: Şeker pişirme aşamasını seçin: 1=İplik (230°F), 2=Yumuşak Top (238°F), 3=Sert Top (245°F), 4=Sert Top (255°F), 5=Yumuşak Kırılma (280°F), 6=Sert Kırılma (305°F), 7=Karamel (335°F), 0=Özel

inputs.label: Altitude (feet)
inputs.businessContext: Elevation above sea level; for every 500 ft, boiling point drops ~1°F

businessContext_i18n.en: Elevation above sea level; for every 500 ft, boiling point drops ~1°F
businessContext_i18n.tr: Deniz seviyesinden yükseklik; her 500 ft'de kaynama noktası ~1°F düşer.

inputs.label: Custom Target Temp (°F)
inputs.businessContext: Target temperature when using custom stage (stage = 0)

businessContext_i18n.en: Target temperature when using custom stage (stage = 0)

inputs.label: Thermometer Offset (°F)
inputs.businessContext: Correction if your thermometer is inaccurate (e.g., +2°F if it reads low)

businessContext_i18n.en: Correction if your thermometer is inaccurate (e.g., +2°F if it reads low)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
